chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الزِّيَارَةِ وَ الْغُسْلِ فِيهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 192 – The Ziyarah (visitation of the Kabah) and the washing with regards to it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/200)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/200)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ غُسْلِ الزِّيَارَةِ يَغْتَسِلُ الرَّجُلُ بِاللَّيْلِ وَ يَزُورُ فِي اللَّيْلِ بِغُسْلٍ وَاحِدٍ أَ يُجْزِئُهُ ذَلِكَ قَالَ يُجْزِئُهُ مَا لَمْ يُحْدِثْ مَا يُوجِبُ وُضُوءاً فَإِنْ أَحْدَثَ فَلْيُعِدْ غُسْلَهُ بِاللَّيْلِ .

en.hubeali: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, from Safwan, from Is’haq Bin Ammar who said,

‘I asked Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> about the washing for the Ziyarah, ‘Should the man wash at night and visit (the Kabah) during the night with one washing, would that suffice him?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It would suffice him for as long as nothing occurs which would Obligate an ablution. So if it does occur, then he should repeat the washing at night’.
en.sarwar: 2. Abu Ali al-Ash’ariy has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Jabbar from Safwan from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about Ghusl (bath) during the night and visiting the House during the night if one Ghusl (bath) is sufficient. He (the Imam) said, ‘It is sufficient as long as things invalidating wudu 5 does not take place, and if something as such takes place, one must take Ghusl (bath) again during the night. ‘“
